subject: Phase 1: Add StratifiedBatchSampler task to plan-4
description: Update plans/plan-4-imitation-learning.md to insert a new Task (after Task 1 ILDataset) for StratifiedBatchSampler in il_dataset.py. Include full spec: groups by (faction, strategy_label, game_phase), max_same_group cap, tests, and update ILTrainer to use it.
